LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WILLIAM KAUPP, BETH FEINBERG MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS, CGC-15-546977 WITH CASE CGC-16-550777. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THIS MATTER WILL BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501, ON MARCH 15, 2017, AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL CASES ALLEGING CLAIMS INVOLVING THE ACQUISITION OF REAL PROPERTY, WHETHER OR NOT OTHER CLAIMS NOT NORMALLY HANDLED IN THAT DEPARTMENT ARE ALSO ALLEGED, SUCH AS CLAIMS FOR CONSTRUCTION DEFECTS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CGC-15-546977 WITH CASE CGC-16-550777
Off Calendar Mar-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William Marchant, Esq. (415-957-3075) for Plaintiff/Moving party William Gordon Kaup.
Andrew Foster Shi, Esq. (415-217-6990) for Defendant/opposing party Paul Zinchik & Fusion Real Estate.(case 546977)
Jocelyn Koo, Esq. (415-981-5411) for Defendant/opposing party JianFeng Chen.

The Court announces the tentative ruling and reasons for it. ARGUED. Defendant (546977) opposes consolidation, there will be confusion, there is a lot of jury instruction. Plaintiff argues.

PLAINTIFF WILLIAM KAUPP, BETH FEINBERG MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CGC-15-546977 WITH CASE CGC-16-550777 is GRANTED. Actions are consolidated for discovery and trial only. Any party may bring an action to bifurcate Chen's claims against the broker and the seller. The trial date in Dept. 206 stands. Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details)Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CGC-15-546977 WITH CASE CGC-16-550777
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Continued To Mar-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM KAUPP, BETH FEINBERG MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS, CGC-15-546977 WITH CASE CGC-16-550777 will be heard, in Department 501, on March 15, 2017, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all cases alleging claims involving the acquisition of real property, whether or not other claims not normally handled in that department are also alleged, such as claims for construction defects. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
